steps.title: Spot the contrast
steps.content: The speaker seeks out old public libraries in the United States. The next sentence says even visiting every state would not find the oldest public library in the Western Hemisphere, because it is in Mexico.

steps.title: Use a concession transition
steps.content: That creates a despite-that contrast. Nevertheless, signals this concession; the other transitions show result, time, or restatement. The answer is B.
